---
title: "@agent-os/workspace-op"
---

<!-- generated by tooling/agentos-cli/src/generate/project-docs-site.mjs; edit docs/packages/workspace-op.md -->

## Purpose

Provider-neutral workspace operation fact carrier for receipt-backed workspace
mutations.

## Invariant

Workspace-op owns request, completion, rejection, settlement, and projection
vocabulary for workspace operations. It does not execute filesystem or shell
effects. Providers execute requests and return completed or rejected facts with
the required external receipt proof.

## Minimal Usage

Emit a `workspace_op.requested` fact for a write-capable workspace tool. A
provider consumes that request and commits either a completed fact with an
`external_receipt` anchor or a rejected fact with a rejected claim. Consumers
read `projectWorkspaceOperation` instead of interpreting provider output
directly.

## Verification

```sh
cd packages/carriers/workspace-op
vp test run
```
